seo.title: Legend of Korea - Mission Adventure following Korean Legends
seo.description: A premium adventure service where you explore legendary places in Korea and solve missions.

common.siteDescription: A mission adventure through Korean legends

auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.nicknameMax: Nickname must be 20 characters or less
auth.duplicateEmail: This email is already in use
auth.heroSubtitle: Become the hero of Korean folklore

home.heroSubtitle: Grab your mission kit and explore the lands of legend
home.step1Desc: Your mission kit is delivered to your accommodation after booking
home.step2Desc: Take your kit and set off for a place steeped in legend
home.step3Desc: Scan QR codes on-site and solve missions on your own
home.step4Desc: Complete missions, collect LP, and rise to legendary status
home.whySubtitle: Not just sightseeing — step inside the legend itself
home.why1Desc: Printed mission cards, storybook, and stamp seal are shipped to your accommodation. A tactile experience no app can replicate.
home.why2Desc: Jeonju Hanok Village, Gyeonggijeon, Gaeksa Street — explore the actual places where Korean folklore was born.
home.why3Desc: Earn LP with every mission, level up your rank, and become a legendary hero. Fun solo or with a partner.
home.faq1Q: How do I receive the mission kit?
home.faq1A: After booking, the kit is shipped free to your Jeonju accommodation. It will arrive before your check-in date.
home.faq2A: Absolutely! Both solo and couple kits are available. The experience is fully designed to be enjoyable alone.
home.faq3Q: Is it available in Japanese and English?
home.faq3A: Yes! All mission cards and web services are available in Korean, Japanese, and English. International travelers are welcome.
home.faq4A: Full refunds are available before the kit is shipped. After shipping, unopened returns are accepted. Please contact customer support.
home.categoryHeading: A new journey to explore cities through Korean legends
home.foodMatchingTitle: You already know what you like
home.foodMatchingSubtitle: We'll connect you to the rest

course.disclaimer: Accommodation and transport bookings are made through external sites. Legend of Korea is not responsible for those bookings.
course.comingSoonDesc: A new legend is being prepared. Stay tuned!
course.storyIntro: Long ago, mischievous dokkaebi lived in Jeonju Hanok Village. Every night, they would tap their magical clubs and hide treasures throughout the village. Under the ancient trees of Gyeonggijeon, within the bells of Jeondong Cathedral, in the sunset viewed from Omokdae... You will follow the dokkaebi traces and discover the hidden stories of Jeonju.

tips.windprotect: Sea breeze can be strong — pack a windbreaker
tips.umbrella: Spring showers likely — carry a small umbrella
tips.sunscreen: UV is rising — sunscreen is a must!
tips.comfyShoes: Lots of walking — comfy shoes recommended
tips.photoReady: Great photo spots await — dress to impress!
tips.indoorCool: A/C indoors — keep a light jacket handy

diy.title: DIY Workshop Experience
diy.subtitle: Book unique handmade experiences across 8 Korean cities
diy.noteText: Most workshops operate on a reservation basis. Book at least 1-2 days in advance to secure your preferred time. Some workshops require a minimum of 2 participants.
diy.noResults: No workshops found for the selected filters

seoul1.name: Bitda Pottery Studio (Hongdae)
seoul1.desc: Create your own pottery in a trendy Hongdae studio. Beginner-friendly with full guidance.

seoul2.name: Dotnote Perfume Lab (Seongsu)
seoul2.desc: Blend your signature fragrance in Seongsu-dong with a professional perfumer.

seoul3.name: Emotion Line Project (Yeonnam)
seoul3.desc: Create emotional artworks in a cozy Yeonnam-dong space. No experience needed.

seoul4.name: Wooyuri Glass Studio
seoul4.desc: Blow glass to make your own cup or objet d'art — a truly unique experience.

busan1.name: Haeundae Pottery Workshop
busan1.desc: Spin the pottery wheel with an ocean view at this beachside studio.

busan2.name: Neon Sign & Rattan Studio
busan2.desc: Create your own neon LED sign or rattan crafts to take home.

busan3.name: Busan Candle Workshop
busan3.desc: Make candles infused with Busan's ocean scents.

jeju1.name: Jeju Pottery Handbuilding
jeju1.desc: Handbuilding pottery with Jeju clay — capture the island's nature in your work.

jeju2.name: Natural Dyeing (Jeju)
jeju2.desc: Dye scarves and handkerchiefs using Jeju's natural materials.

jeju3.name: Jeju Leather Workshop
jeju3.desc: Premium one-day class making leather wallets, keyrings, and card holders.

gyeongju1.name: Gyeongju Pottery Studio
gyeongju1.desc: Make pottery using traditional techniques in the ancient capital.

gyeongju2.name: Hanbok Accessory Making
gyeongju2.desc: Create traditional Korean accessories and ornaments to take home.

tongyeong2.name: Candle & Soap Workshop
tongyeong2.desc: Make candles and soaps inspired by Tongyeong's coastal charm.

cheonan1.name: Daon Made Ring Studio
cheonan1.desc: Craft couple or friendship rings — a memorable keepsake.

cheonan2.name: Leather Craft Class
cheonan2.desc: Practical one-day class for leather wallets and keyrings.

yongin1.name: Folk Village Traditional Craft
yongin1.desc: Make fans, hanji paper items using traditional methods at the Folk Village.

yongin2.name: Candle & Plaster Diffuser
yongin2.desc: Choose your favorite scent and create beautiful candles and plaster diffusers.

icheon1.name: Icheon Ceramics Studio
icheon1.desc: Pottery experience in Korea's ceramics capital. Wheel throwing available.

icheon2.name: Wheel Throwing One-Day Class
icheon2.desc: Advanced class with a professional potter — throw your own bowl on the wheel.

story.title: The Legend Behind This Quest
story.ctaCard: Become the hero of this legend
story.card1: Long ago, a mysterious legend was passed down through this land.
story.card2: The hero of the legend set out to solve riddles and find hidden treasures.
story.card3: The people and places along the journey became eternal memories.
story.card4: Now, you are the new hero of this legend.

normal.1: Just take photos at tourist spots

legend.6: Level up your tier with LP → Exclusive rewards per rank

kit.title: What's in the Kit
kit.subtitle: Everything you need for an extraordinary journey
kit.delivery: Guaranteed delivery 3 days before your trip
kit.multilang: Mission cards in EN / JA / KO

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can I receive the kit outside Korea?
faq.a1: We deliver to your accommodation in Korea. It'll be at the front desk before check-in.
faq.q2: Do I need to speak Korean?
faq.a2: All mission cards are available in English, Japanese, and Korean.
faq.a3: Solo, couples, and families are all welcome.
faq.q4: How do I receive mission rewards?
faq.a4: Complete missions in-app to instantly earn digital badges + partner discount coupons.
faq.q5: Can I do missions without the kit?
faq.a5: The kit contains mission cards, maps, and hints — it's essential for the experience.
